title: Divya Prem
desc: Long ago, a dark Mohini named Karn Mohini gained immense powers by killing others. Only Netra survived, and her daughter was prophesied to defeat Karn Mohini on Earth.

title: Satyaa Sachee
desc: Two individuals navigate love, family obligations, and hidden secrets within a traditional household, finding hope and strength in their bond amidst challenges.

title: Nandini Ka Pratishodh
desc: Shapeshifting snake Nandini seeks revenge for Ratnavel's misdeeds and to reclaim the three Kalachakras. Watch the serpent's tale of vengeance against an ardent devotee of the Goddess of snakes, Ganga
